removed.hydroelectric specimen // hydroelectric: [[Hydroelectric Specimen // Hydroelectric Laboratory]] was cut during validation to reduce the list back to 100 cards.

General cleanup restored land count stability for this constructed deck.
General cleanup guard preserved core multi-copy cards to avoid an archetype pivot.
results.summary: Transformed: General refinement. Power Focused, budget Moderate. Avg CMC ~2.18.
results.why: This pass is a general refinement aimed at tightening low-cost play patterns while keeping the deck's core plan intact. [[Mutable Explorer]], [[Rat King, Verminister]], [[Stocking the Pantry]], [[Unfortunate Accident]], and [[Zimone, All-Questioning]] add more useful action than the cuts. The land swap also helps stabilize the deck's count after cleanup without pushing it into a different archetype.

raw.summary: Transformed: General refinement. Power Focused, budget Moderate. Avg CMC ~2.18.
raw.plan: This pass is a general refinement aimed at tightening low-cost play patterns while keeping the deck's core plan intact. [[Mutable Explorer]], [[Rat King, Verminister]], [[Stocking the Pantry]], [[Unfortunate Accident]], and [[Zimone, All-Questioning]] add more useful action than the cuts. The land swap also helps stabilize the deck's count after cleanup without pushing it into a different archetype.
raw.why: This pass is a general refinement aimed at tightening low-cost play patterns while keeping the deck's core plan intact. [[Mutable Explorer]], [[Rat King, Verminister]], [[Stocking the Pantry]], [[Unfortunate Accident]], and [[Zimone, All-Questioning]] add more useful action than the cuts. The land swap also helps stabilize the deck's count after cleanup without pushing it into a different archetype.

added.mutable explorer: [[Mutable Explorer]] adds flexible early-game value at a low cost.
added.rat king, verminister: [[Rat King, Verminister]] gives the deck a stronger standalone threat.
added.stocking the pantry: [[Stocking the Pantry]] improves consistency by turning mana into resources.
added.unfortunate accident: [[Unfortunate Accident]] adds efficient interaction for a focused build.
added.zimone, all-questioning: [[Zimone, All-Questioning]] increases card flow and utility without raising the curve much.

removed.tolls of war: [[Tolls of War]] was trimmed because it was less efficient than the incoming options.
removed.forest: [[Forest]] was cut as part of restoring a cleaner, more stable land mix.
removed.otterball antics: [[Otterball Antics]] was removed for being a lower-impact slot in this focused pass.
removed.starting town: [[Starting Town]] was cut to help normalize the mana base during cleanup.

warnings: General cleanup restored land count stability for this constructed deck.
General cleanup guard preserved core multi-copy cards to avoid an archetype pivot.
